history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The open cell to my right is safe, so I will turn right to face it and prepare to move through the corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward and the cell in front of me is open, while the cell to the right is a wall. Since I can safely advance toward the open path, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m still facing upward, but the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. Turning left would keep me adjacent to the wall on the right side and is the safest step to reorient toward open space.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing left now. The cell in front of me is open, and moving forward keeps me within the clear corridor while avoiding the nearby lava and wall. I will advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
